libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property appears necessary. For 2.0.0-M1, do not rely on org.apache.pekko.http.ccompat classes from 1.3.0; the resolved jar contains org.apache.pekko.macros.LogHelper and LogHelperMacro instead. If tests directly exercise private[pekko] Scala APIs, place that Scala test code under an org.apache.pekko package or use reflection.

deterministic_setup.reason: pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1 declares pekko-actor_2.13 as provided, and LogHelper references org.apache.pekko.event.LoggingAdapter and Pekko annotations from that artifact.
pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1 declares scala-reflect as provided, and LogHelperMacro uses scala.reflect.macros.blackbox.Context.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8878 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-parsing_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact is internal and its public surface changed significantly from 1.3.0, so existing ccompat-based tests are stale for 2.0.0-M1.
Coverage may remain narrow because the jar primarily exposes compile-time macro support rather than normal runtime APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The 2.0.0-M1 artifact is an internal Pekko HTTP parsing support jar whose reachable API is mainly Scala macro/logging helpers; its POM marks required macro/logging dependencies as provided, so meaningful tests need them on the test classpath.
